summary: REQ-1 is implemented in AppPreviewSection.tsx: the CTA button is renamed to 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' and links to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D' opening in a new tab. However, the diff also shows a second anchor tag (download badge) in the same section pointing to the same invite URL, which was not part of the original request.

hallucinated_features.description: A second anchor element (App Store/Google Play download badge) in AppPreviewSection also uses the invite link 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D', which was not requested by REQ-1.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 only requested updating the single 'Become Poppo Agent' CTA button. The diff shows an additional download-badge anchor also set to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D', which is an unrequested modification.
